item.title: Diagnosis and treatment of neonatal gastrointestinal diseases in extremely premature infants using ultrathin colonoscopy.
item.description: Pediatric research - BACKGROUND: This study aimed to evaluate the diagnostic and therapeutic utility of ultrathin colonoscopy for lower gastrointestinal disorders in neonates, including extremely preterm infants and to...

item.title: Comparison of Conventional versus Abbreviated MR Enterography: Assessing Disease Activity and Complications in Crohn Disease.
item.description: Radiology - Background MR enterography (MRE) is increasingly used to guide treatment and improve outcomes in Crohn disease (CD). An abbreviated MRE (A-MRE) protocol-omitting contrast and antiperistaltic agents...

item.title: Systemic Immune Signatures of Endoscopic-Histologic Discordance in Inflammatory Bowel Disease: A Pilot Study.
item.description: Journal of clinical medicine - Background: Endoscopic remission is a central therapeutic target in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD); however, histologic inflammation may persist despite apparent mucosal healing. The biological m...
